{{Quote|Battleship standing by...|The captain of a ''Keldabe'' cruiser|<ref name="FoC" />}}
The '''''Keldabe''-class cruiser''', also known as the '''''Keldabe''-class battleship''', was one of several different [[Warship/Legends|warship]] classes utilized by [[Tyber Zann]]'s [[Zann Consortium/Legends|faction]] and others in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. At least one vessel of this class was employed by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] during the Galactic Civil War.

==Description==
===Dimensions===
[[File:Keldabe-bwing-recg.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A ''Keldabe''-class battleship under attack by a flight of [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing starfighters]].]]
Like the [[Crusader-class corvette|''Crusader''-class corvette]], the ''Keldabe''-class battleship was a [[Mandal Hypernautics Corporation|Mandal Hypernautics]] design.<ref name="RECG" /> The ship was named after [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore's]] capital, [[Keldabe/Legends|Keldabe]]. Like other Mandalorian starships, the battleship design was marked by sharp edges hearkening back to the ancient Mandalorian [[Kandosii-type dreadnaught|''Kandosii''-type dreadnaught]].<ref name="DHB">{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=boards/viewtopic.php?p=155018|thread=KOTOR #15/16 art questions|user=[[Dustin Weaver]]|date=2007-05-09|time=14:07}}</ref>
Another significant aspect of the design was the tower atop the main superstructure, which was similar in design to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]].<ref name="FoC" />

===Offensive and defensive systems===
[[File:Zann_Consortium_fleet_MPQ.png|thumb|right|150px|''Keldabe''-class battleships within a Zann Consortium fleet.]]
''Keldabes'' were able to compete with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]], boasting an armament of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], and a group of [[Mass-driver cannon/Legends|mass driver]] weapons. The mass drivers were located in batteries between the two engine systems and at the front of the ship. Overall, the battleship was approximately a third more powerful than the Consortium's [[Aggressor-class destroyer|''Aggressor''-class destroyer]], but this also led each battleship to be much more expensive. Through technology acquired from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] via the black market, a capability of the starship's design was the ability to leech energy from enemy vessels via its shields in order to supply power for its own weapon systems.<ref name="FoC" />

==History==
[[File:Kedalbe_battleship1.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Rear view of a ''Keldabe''-class [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]].]]
The [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] obtained the ''Keldabe''-class battleship after its [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] extorted plans from [[Mandal Hypernautics Corporation|Mandal Hypernautics]]. [[Tyber Zann]], although annoyed by the [[Unidentified Zann Consortium captain|pirate's]] disobeying of his orders to leave the shipyards alone, nonetheless added the ''Keldabe''-class to his fleet, after executing the offending ship captain. ''Keldabe''-class battleships were later used in many Consortium operations, such as the [[Battle for the Eclipse|Battle for the ''Eclipse'']].<ref name="FoC" />
